targets.expr: 1000 * sum by (instance) (rate(node_disk_read_time_seconds_total{device=~"nvme.*"}[5m])) / sum by (instance) (rate(node_disk_reads_completed_total{device=~"nvme.*"}[5m])) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_role{role="master"}, "instance", "$1", "node", "(.+)")

1000 * sum by (instance) (rate(node_disk_write_time_seconds_total{device=~"nvme.*"}[5m])) / sum by (instance) (rate(node_disk_writes_completed_total{device=~"nvme.*"}[5m])) * on(instance) group_left(node) label_replace(kube_node_role{role="master"}, "instance", "$1", "node", "(.+)")
